title: EPSS Newsletter 2026
seoDescription: A digital-first annual newsletter template for UCLA Earth, Planetary, and Space Sciences.

hero.imageAlt: Mountain valley landscape from the EPSS 2025 newsletter.
hero.title: EPSS Annual Newsletter
hero.dek: 2025–2026 from Earth and beyond: A year of discovery, fieldwork, mentorship, remembrance, and Bruin science.

meta.title: Our annual newsletter, rebuilt as a digital issue.
meta.body: Same annual roundup, easier to browse and share.

sections.title: Current Story Plan
sections.intro: These cards are editorial placeholders, not final article titles. They organize the updated contents into production-ready lanes.

items.title: Student feature
items.detail: Lizzy Su or Megan Li / EYU

items.title: David Southwood lecture
items.detail: A tale of two agencies, NASA and ESA

items.title: Memorials and obituaries
items.detail: Art Montana, Ronald Shreve, Candace Hansen, Gerald Schubert

items.title: Awards
items.detail: Chancellor Postdocs, 51 Pegasi B, NASA FINESST, faculty honors

items.title: Journal covers
items.detail: Visual roundup if enough examples are collected

stories.title: Opening Letter from the Department Chair
stories.summary: Use this lead story for the annual welcome, department-wide reflection, priorities for the year ahead, and links into the rest of the issue.

stories.imageAlt: Space research graphic from the newsletter image archive.
stories.title: RIMFAX: Seeing Beneath the Martian Surface
stories.summary: A long-form feature slot for the RIMFAX story, with room for David Paige and Emily Cardarelli context, mission visuals, pull quotes, figures, and related links.

sections.title: Short stories about events, students, and EPSS research.
sections.intro: Use this module for planned pieces that are bigger than a planning-board line but smaller than a lead feature.

cards.title: David Jewitt and Hilke Schlichting
cards.summary: Interview or visual Q&A slot for the science, art, and creative-process feature.

cards.title: Geophysics 136C in the Field
cards.summary: Short field-course story that can stand alone or feed into the Suburban retrospective.

cards.title: Undergraduate Summer Fellowships
cards.summary: Recognition module for fellowship recipients, projects, mentors, and short student research notes.

cards.title: Journal Covers
cards.summary: Visual roundup for published cover art, figures, captions, and links to the associated papers.

cards.title: Welcome New Faculty and Staff
cards.summary: Keep as a reusable template slot; publish it only if the final 2026 issue confirms names and photos.

sections.title: The People and Places of EPSS

cards.title: Edwin Schauble: Isotope Analysis
cards.summary: Feature slot for a faculty profile with research overview, accessible science framing, and quotes.

cards.imageAlt: Allen F. Glazner in the field.
cards.title: Allen F. Glazner
cards.summary: Alumni profile slot for career path, EPSS connection, scientific impact, and archival imagery.

cards.title: Lizzy Su or Megan Li
cards.summary: Student feature slot for future plans, final-year perspective, EYU, or another recent graduate angle.

cards.title: EPSSSO Highlight
cards.summary: Recruitment and community story for student leadership, events, mentoring, and ways to get involved.

cards.title: Suburban Retrospective
cards.summary: Photo-rich field-program story about the department field vehicle's life, classes, trips, and farewell.

cards.imageAlt: Flowers used as a memorial placeholder.
cards.title: Memorials and Obituaries
cards.summary: Respectful remembrance slots for Art Montana, Ronald Shreve, Candace Hansen, and Gerald Schubert.

cards.imageAlt: Community gathering placeholder for retiree farewell.
cards.title: Retirements and Signoffs
cards.summary: Career milestone format for Craig Manning, Gilles Peltzer, Steve Joy, and Peter Chi.

sections.title: Signals from the field, lab, and sky.
sections.intro: Short dispatches from BALBOA, Eos research highlights, journal covers, and the hands-on work that keeps science moving.

items.title: Xiaoyan Zhou: BALBOA aurora balloon project update
items.body: One-page research update slot with mission context, current status, images, and what readers should watch for next.

items.title: Jonathan Mitchell: Eos features and research findings
items.body: Short synthesis format for recent research coverage, key findings, and links to the original pieces.

items.title: AI-proof faculty work
items.body: Multi-faculty roundup format for hands-on, field-based, instrument-based, or creative scholarly work.

panels.title: Honors and Recognition
panels.summary: Annual list module for Chancellor Postdoctoral Fellows, 51 Pegasi B Fellows, NASA FINESST, Jean-Luc Margot's Royal Academy of Belgium honor, Hao Cao's Sloan Fellowship, undergraduate summer fellowships, undergraduate awards, and PhD fellowships.

panels.title: Celebrating the Class
panels.summary: Photo-forward recap for graduates, speakers, degree lists, ceremony highlights, and awardees.

panels.title: Donors and Endowments
panels.summary: Donor recognition can live here as a searchable annual honor roll, grouped by fund, endowment, or giving level if desired.

sections.title: Designed for future issues.
items: Each confirmed story type has a stable anchor, making annual content swaps straightforward.
The layout supports short cards, Q&A updates, image-led features, and long-form article pages/sections.
Images currently use locally extracted 2025 newsletter assets as placeholders and can be replaced with final 2026 media.

footer.organization: UCLA Earth, Planetary, and Space Sciences
